Outcome intelligence + AI-assisted protocols, on top of your existing systems

New direction

Outcome intelligence layer — not an EMR replacement.

Your current EMR keeps doing what it does. We sit on top: turning consults, notes, and labs into draft protocols and cohort-level intelligence. Provider always reviews and approves.

AI Protocol Builder
Consult recording → draft protocol with sources cited. Provider approves.
Patient Personas
5 cohorts. What's working, for whom, with what effectiveness.
HIPAA Method
BAAs in place, no PCI scope, 4-week pilot path.
156 patients · 5 cohorts
Already enough data to draft protocols with cited sources.
